moments.title: Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: Today marks the summer solstice, the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere

angles.name: Seasonal Moment
angles.copy: The longest day of the year is here, make the most of the sunshine

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: As the summer solstice arrives, get ready for long evenings and warm weather

angles.name: Summer of Sport
angles.copy: The summer solstice marks the beginning of a packed summer of sport, including Wimbledon and the British Grand Prix

moments.title: Wimbledon Countdown
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are just over a week away, running from June 29 to July 12

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of grass-court tennis as Wimbledon approaches

angles.name: British Hope
angles.copy: Who will be the British players to watch at this year's Wimbledon Championships?

angles.name: SW19
angles.copy: The wait is almost over, Wimbledon is just around the corner, will we see a new champion crowned?

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place on July 5, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: F1 Countdown
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just over two weeks away, who will take the top spot on the podium?

angles.name: Silverstone
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix returns to Silverstone, one of the most iconic tracks in the F1 calendar

angles.name: Racing Action
angles.copy: Get ready for high-speed action as the British Grand Prix takes center stage on July 5
